task_description: Create a Master MT5 Expert Advisor in MQL5 by combining Symphony (entry/stop/phase engine base), Letra 37 (multi-TF structure engine, Engine 1A lifecycle, Energy Resolution Framework, belief/hypothesis/prediction engines, FRZ), and F16 (Invisible Network, F72 Curve Tree, Campaign Ownership, Senseei meta-intelligence, Time Intelligence). Output is split into 9 parts (8 .mqh + 1 .mq5) saved to the repo. Entry is probabilistic (entryProb > 90%). All panels/dashboards included.
